title: Fix date deserialization timezone ignoring
description: In `marshmallow/fields.py`, when deserializing a DateTime field, if the input string has a timezone offset but the field is instantiated with `tzinfo=None`, it sometimes drops the timezone data instead of rejecting or converting it. Ensure it strictly respects the `tzinfo` parameter.

title: Add tests for Session.rebuild_auth
description: The method `Session.rebuild_auth` in `requests/sessions.py` lacks comprehensive unit tests for when a request redirects from HTTP to HTTPS on the same host. Please generate pytest cases to cover this specific transition.

title: Handle invalid missing header in BackgroundTasks
description: If a user attempts to add a background task that relies on an injected dependency that is missing, it currently fails silently. We need `starlette/background.py` to raise a specific ValueError if an expected callable is None.
